articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: Goal! Dominican Republic 1, Dominica 0. Dorny Romero (Dominican Republic) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Edarlyn Reyes with a cross.
Goal! Dominican Republic 2, Dominica 0. Jimmy Kaparos (Dominican Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pablo Rosario.
Goal! Dominican Republic 3, Dominica 0. Noah Dollenmayer (Dominican Republic) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Peter Federico with a cross following a corner.

Goal! Dominican Republic 4, Dominica 0. Edarlyn Reyes (Dominican Republic) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Peter Federico with a through ball following a fast break.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Miguel Beltré replaces Luiyi de Lucas.
Second Half begins Dominican Republic 4, Dominica 0.
Miguel Beltré (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Juan Pineda replaces João Urbáez.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Juan Familia-Castillo replaces Edarlyn Reyes.
Substitution, Dominica. Keeyan Thomas replaces Malachai Bonney.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Rafa Núñez replaces Heinz Mörschel.
Audel Laville (Dominica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Dominica. Reon Cuffy replaces Troy Jules.
Substitution, Dominica. Javid George replaces Audel Laville.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Lucas Bretón replaces Pablo Rosario.
Goal! Dominican Republic 5, Dominica 0. Peter Federico (Dominican Republic) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jimmy Kaparos.
Second Half ends, Dominican Republic 5, Dominica 0.
